title: bridge-jmap email_query: no iteration cap → infinite loop on malicious JMAP server
description: email_query paginates in a loop, stopping only when page_len < PAGE_SIZE or position >= total. A JMAP server can set total=u64::MAX and always return a full 50-item page. The loop never terminates. Trigger: any JMAP server (misconfigured or adversarial) that returns a very large 'total' field and full pages. Bad behavior: bridge-jmap spins in an infinite HTTP request loop, exhausting the JMAP server's rate limits and hanging the main bridge loop indefinitely.
